hero.title: What is UNs?
hero.subtitle: Youth Supporters Building Busan as a City of Peace

vision.title: 🇺🇳 UNs (UN Supporters)
vision.description1: Youth supporters who reflect on the significance of UN participation and communicate and spread the value of peace with citizens.
vision.description3: - Scale: Approximately 110 members (Korean and international students)
vision.description4: - Operated by: Busan Metropolitan City, Busan Global City Foundation

globalYouth.title: Education
globalYouth.description: Professional education on international organizations and the UN, learning about peace, human rights, and development issues

peacefulDialogue.title: Event Planning & Support
peacefulDialogue.description: Participation in planning major Busan UN Week events, on-site operation and facilitation support

dynamicAction.title: Promotional Content Creation
dynamicAction.description: Planning and producing various forms of SNS content including videos, posters, and card news

inclusiveCommunity.title: Global Networking
inclusiveCommunity.description: Exchange with domestic and international youth, opportunities to participate in international events

mission.title: Vision & Mission
mission.item1: Leading the operation of UN Week projects by Busan youth
mission.item2: Pioneering the branding of Busan as a global center for peace
mission.item3: Promoting the meaning and value of Busan UN Week for the 80th anniversary of the UN

cta.title: Build Peace Together with UNs
cta.description: Meet our activities as we work together to create a peaceful world.
